plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-412 RP13.P07.M06.S01-RP13.P08.M03.S15 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-412 implements descriptor-only coverage that closes the RP13.P07 phase (M06 Synthetic Fixture Set, M07 Test And Golden Case Set, M08 Hermes Evidence Packet, M09 Claude Review Packet, M10 Closeout And Next Handoff) and opens the RP13.P08 foundation (M00 Scope Inventory, M01 Contract Draft, M02 Type And Shape Definition, M03 Primary Implementation Slice head) as nine descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H13), Claude review packet (C13), and CP00-413 handoff, without opening payments, payment matching, AR aging, or journal entry runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary:
CP00-412 (RP13.P07.M06.S01–RP13.P08.M03.S15, risk C, 150 units) is a clean, descriptor-only payments-core pack that closes RP13.P07 (M06–M10) and opens the RP13.P08 foundation (M00–M03 head). Independent review through Read/Grep/Glob found no defects; verdict PASS with zero findings.

Scope and distribution independently verified by counting deliverable_type occurrences in review-baseline.json: failure_recovery 58, hermes_evidence 44, implementation 20, security_audit 9, test 9, claude_review 6, fixture 4 = 150, exactly matching the baseline, manifest delivery_counts, and PAYMENTS_CORE_CP412_REQUIREMENTS (phase_counts RP13.P07=99 + RP13.P08=51). Range, risk class, upstream (CP00-411), next (CP00-413), and next_subphase (RP13.P08.M03.S16) are consistent across registry.js, service.js, validators.js, contracts/payments-core-contract.json, the validate script, model.test.js, and the manifest.

production_ready is NOT overclaimed: manifest.json:6 and command-evidence.json:7 both set production_ready:false with status implemented_pending_review / implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout, implementation_layer:descriptor, runtime_ready:false. The production_ready_flag is a descriptor-verification string, not a boolean trust claim. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are comprehensively attested (freezeCp412Result writes_product_state:false, all dispatches_*_runtime:false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, no_real_data:true) and enforced by validatePaymentsCoreCp412P07CloseoutP08FoundationDescriptor, which rejects any non-descriptor or runtime-executing row.

Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only and explicitly not final approver (allowed_claude_tools=[Read,Grep,Glob], read_only:true, claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false) asserted in the validator, tests, and contract. Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor evidence/receipt shapes (receipt_shape descriptor_only..._no_write; no_hermes_runtime_receipt:true; hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false), not product runtime.

Review-hardening (CP178+) satisfied: forbidden_review_evidence covers auth failures, zero-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, disabled tools, and missing required fields. The review pipeline evidence is itself valid — readiness-report.json auth_preflight passed (exit 0, 1446-byte well-formed JSON), validation-report.json shows forbidden_tools_present:false and correctly prohibits summary-only review for this Risk C / security-audit / review-evidence pack. All implementation, test, contract, and repo-wide validation commands in command-evidence.json are recorded exit 0, corroborated by source inspection of the validator and test assertions. The unrelated c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json (an LDIP-track BLOCK) is correctly scoped out per changed-file-scope.json. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are appropriately absent at this pre-closeout stage. This PASS is reviewer input only; human final approval remains required for any enterprise trust claim.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-412 payments core p07 closeout p08 foundation descriptor pack
